name: Chile Cheese Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt oleo in a saucepan. Add flour and cook until thickened.
2. Drain the corn and add it to the egg mixture along with bread crumbs.
3. Stir in the green chile, milk, salt, and remaining bread crumbs.
4. Pour the casserole into a greased baking dish and top with cracker crumbs.
5. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F. This dish can be frozen ahead of time.
